creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 158099
patch - QGIS update to 2.10.0

- Update to version 2.10.0
- New Option DEBUG for extension testers
- GRASS option broken now on 8.x and 9.x
- Show QGIS-Codeversion (GIT hash) in 'Help -> About'


QGIS version 2.10.0 seem to have a problem on FreeBSD 9.x with GRASS option enabled, see 

    qgis-2.10.0_F093_options_default_enabled_ERROR.log. 

Unfortunately, I have no clue how to solve it.


-------------------
Poudriere logs are attached for HEAD (default and GRASS options enabled; all options disabled), 10.1 (default and GRASS options enabled) and 9.3 (default options enabled).

portlint -AC
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
